paths.name: @anthropic-ai/sdk
paths.message: Use @kinetiks/ai router (routeAskClaude / routeAskClaudeMultiTurn). Direct Anthropic SDK imports are only permitted inside packages/ai.

patterns.message: Use @kinetiks/ai router. Direct Anthropic SDK imports are only permitted inside packages/ai.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Don't call tool.execute() directly. Use AgentRun.invokeTool() from @kinetiks/runtime, or executeTool() from @kinetiks/tools. Direct tool execution bypasses authority resolution, idempotency, retry, and tool_calls logging.
